sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Bank of America's Q4 Loan Growth Snapshot: The Mix Matters
feed.summary: Bank of America's loan book expanded in Q4 2025, primarily driven by commercial lending, which grew 12% year-over-year. Consumer lending saw a more modest 4% increase. This mix is significant as commercial lending is more sensitive to economic conditions, and the article notes that JPMorgan and Citigroup also show similar trends with stronger wholesale loan growth.

feed.title: McDonald's franchisees send a message with a 'bill of rights'
feed.summary: An independent group of McDonald's franchisees, the National Owners Association (NOA), has approved a "Franchisee Bill of Rights" outlining 15 standards for fair franchising. These rights cover crucial aspects like the ability to set prices, profitability-focused marketing, and reasonable capital requirements, reflecting growing tensions between operators and the fast-food giant. The initiative highlights a shift in the franchisee-franchisor relationship, particularly concerning recent changes instituted by McDonald's leadership.

feed.title: ADP: Weekly US employment up by 7,750
feed.summary: This article provides a brief update on US employment data, indicating an increase of 7,750 in weekly employment according to ADP. No further details are available in the provided content beyond this headline statistic.

feed.title: Cisco Systems, Inc. $CSCO Shares Purchased by Straight Path Wealth Management
feed.summary: Straight Path Wealth Management significantly increased its stake in Cisco Systems, Inc. by 257.4% in Q3, bringing their total holdings to 20,000 shares. This comes amidst strong analyst upgrades and revised price targets for Cisco, driven by growing AI revenue prospects. Despite significant insider selling by the CEO and other executives, institutional investors now own a substantial portion of the company's stock.

feed.title: Ownership Capital B.V. Lowers Stock Holdings in Adobe Inc. $ADBE
feed.summary: Ownership Capital B.V. significantly reduced its stake in Adobe Inc. by 89.3% in Q3, selling 198,377 shares and now holding 23,793 shares valued at $8.393 million. This adjustment makes Adobe the 12th largest holding for the firm, representing 4.7% of its portfolio. Despite this, Adobe exceeded quarterly expectations with an EPS of $5.50 and revenue of $6.19 billion, and provided positive guidance for Q1 and FY2026 earnings.

feed.title: Ownership Capital B.V. Sells 103,193 Shares of Insulet Corporation $PODD
feed.summary: Ownership Capital B.V. significantly reduced its stake in Insulet Corporation (NASDAQ:PODD) by 89.3%, selling 103,193 shares in the third quarter and now holding 12,381 shares valued at $3.822 million. Insulet, a medical instruments supplier, reported an EPS beat of $1.24 against an estimate of $1.13, though revenue missed expectations. The company maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $379.10.

feed.title: Ownership Capital B.V. Sells 38,528 Shares of Mettler-Toledo International, Inc. $MTD
feed.summary: Ownership Capital B.V. significantly reduced its stake in Mettler-Toledo International (NYSE:MTD) by selling 38,528 shares, decreasing its position by 89.3%. Despite this sale, Bank of New York Mellon, Norges Bank, and Rakuten Investment Management Inc. were among other large institutions that increased their exposure to MTD, with institutional investors owning approximately 95.07% of the stock. Mettler-Toledo also reported strong Q3 earnings, beating expectations, and provided optimistic guidance for Q4 FY2025 and the full year.

feed.title: MSCI Inc $MSCI Shares Sold by Ownership Capital B.V.
feed.summary: Ownership Capital B.V. significantly reduced its stake in MSCI Inc. by 89.3% in Q3 2026, selling 119,645 shares and retaining 14,321 shares valued at $8.13 million. MSCI reported strong Q3 earnings, beating EPS estimates, and announced a $3.0 billion share buyback program. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus for MSCI, with several price target increases.

feed.title: 65,200 Shares in Invesco QQQ $QQQ Acquired by Pilgrim Partners Asia Pte Ltd
feed.summary: Pilgrim Partners Asia Pte Ltd recently acquired a new position of 65,200 shares in Invesco QQQ (NASDAQ:QQQ) during the third quarter, valued at approximately $39.144 million. This investment now represents 17.4% of the firm's portfolio, making it their largest holding. Invesco QQQ also increased its quarterly dividend to $0.7941 per share, leading to an annualized payout of $3.18 and a yield of approximately 0.5%.

feed.title: Short-staffed car dealers get virtual finance pros from Assurant
feed.summary: Assurant, Inc. (NYSE: AIZ) has launched F&I On Demand™, a virtual staffing solution to help auto dealerships facing personnel shortages in finance and insurance (F&I) departments. This patent-pending service connects dealers with Assurant's highly trained virtual F&I specialists who guide customers through the final stages of the sales process, including financing, protection product offers, titling, and registration. The service aims to boost dealership efficiency and profitability while improving customer satisfaction through a transparent digital experience.

feed.title: U.S. employers add 7,750 jobs a week as gains keep shrinking
feed.summary: ADP's preliminary estimate for the four weeks ending January 3, 2026, indicates that U.S. private employers added an average of 7,750 jobs per week, a decline for the third consecutive week. This weekly NER Pulse uses high-frequency payroll data and is seasonally adjusted, offering insights into real-time employment trends. The next report is scheduled for release on February 10, 2026.

feed.title: One Year On, Trump's Golden Dome Missile Defense System Struggles For Momentum As China Pushes Ahead: Report
feed.summary: One year after its establishment, President Donald Trump's 'Golden Dome' missile-defense initiative is facing significant delays due to technical disputes and concerns over space-based components, despite a $25 billion allocation. While Lockheed Martin expressed readiness, internal debates on anti-satellite capabilities and procurement issues have stalled progress. Meanwhile, China is reportedly advancing rapidly with its own global air defense system, potentially surpassing the U.S. initiative.

feed.title: Invesco Q4 earnings top, revenue top consensus, helped by strong net inflows (IVZ:NYSE)
feed.summary: Invesco (IVZ) shares rose in premarket trading after the investment management firm reported strong Q4 results, surpassing analysts' expectations for both earnings and revenue. The company's performance was bolstered by robust net market gains, significant net long-term inflows of $19.1 billion, and effective expense management. This led to a widened adjusted operating margin and improved overall profitability.

feed.title: Ownership Capital B.V. Has $13.40 Million Stock Holdings in PTC Inc. $PTC
feed.summary: Ownership Capital B.V. significantly reduced its stake in PTC Inc. by 89.3% in the third quarter, now holding 66,006 shares valued at $13.40 million. This position still represents 7.5% of its portfolio and is its third-largest holding. Despite significant insider selling totaling over $10 million in the last 90 days, Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for PTC.

feed.title: Ownership Capital B.V. Cuts Stock Position in Intuit Inc. $INTU
feed.summary: Ownership Capital B.V. significantly reduced its stake in Intuit Inc. by 89.3% in the third quarter, selling over 150,000 shares while Intuit remains its 5th largest holding. Concurrently, several insiders, including CEO Sasan K. Goodarzi, sold a substantial number of shares, totaling over $255 million in the last 90 days. Despite these sales, analysts generally maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for Intuit, with an average price target of $791.73, following strong earnings performance and positive guidance.

feed.title: Invesco Ltd. Declares Preferred Cash Dividend the Period from September 1, 2025 Through November 30, 2025, Payable on December 1, 2025
feed.summary: Invesco Ltd. announced a fourth-quarter cash dividend of $0.21 per share for common shareholders. This dividend is payable on March 3, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 13, 2026, with the ex-dividend date also on February 13, 2026. This declaration follows a period where Invesco posted higher fourth-quarter profits, driven by market rallies that lifted its assets to record levels.

feed.title: General Motors' Q4 profit beats expectations, sets upbeat guidance, raises dividend (GM:NYSE)
feed.summary: General Motors (GM) reported better-than-expected Q4 profits, leading to an increased dividend and a new $6 billion share buyback program. Despite a 5% decline in sales and a substantial $7.2 billion write-off from its electric vehicle business, the company provided upbeat guidance, with its adjusted profit forecast exceeding market expectations. GM's shares showed gains in premarket trading following these announcements.

feed.title: Humana, Alignment Healthcare, Nucor And Other Big Stocks Moving Lower In Tuesday's Pre-Market Session
feed.summary: Several major stocks, including Humana, Alignment Healthcare, and Nucor, saw significant drops in Tuesday's pre-market trading. Health insurers like Humana and UnitedHealth Group declined due to reports that the Trump administration plans to propose "roughly flat" rates for Medicare insurers in 2027. Other companies like Brand Engagement Network and Sanmina Corp also experienced declines for various reasons, including a recent stock offering and disappointing financial results.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson Marks $100 Million of MedTech Products Donated Since 2020 to Help People Live, See and Smile
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson, supported by the J&J Foundation, has donated $100 million in MedTech products since 2020 to improve access to specialized care globally. The company plans to add another $20 million in 2026 for programs and impact investments that empower health workers in cardiovascular, vision, and surgical care. These efforts, part of the J&J CareCommunity platform, aim to close gaps in access to specialized care by providing medical tools, technologies, and training to health workers in under-resourced communities.

feed.title: Red Cedar Investment Management LLC Makes New $1.91 Million Investment in Cisco Systems, Inc. $CSCO
feed.summary: Red Cedar Investment Management LLC recently invested $1.91 million in Cisco Systems, Inc. by acquiring 27,901 shares. Despite significant insider selling, analysts are becoming more bullish on CSCO, with Evercore upgrading the stock to "outperform" and price targets being raised due to accelerating AI revenue opportunities. Cisco also launched a new partner program to accelerate AI deployments, contributing to renewed institutional buying interest.

feed.summary: Kornitzer Capital Management Inc. KS reduced its stake in CoStar Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:CSGP) by 14.2% in the third quarter, selling 38,230 shares, though still holding 231,626 shares valued at $19.54 million. feed.title: Scalar Gauge Management LLC Makes New $2.05 Million Investment in Cisco Systems, Inc. $CSCO
feed.summary: Scalar Gauge Management LLC has invested $2.05 million in Cisco Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ:CSCO), acquiring 30,000 shares, making it their 24th largest holding. Analysts have largely maintained a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target of $86.81, driven by positive sentiment around AI and improved forward guidance.

The company recently announced a dividend and has received updated price targets from various equity research analysts.

feed.title: Boeing beats loss forecast, shares steady as one-time gain masks ongoing risks (BA:NYSE)
feed.summary: Boeing reported fourth-quarter results that surpassed Wall Street expectations for earnings and revenue, primarily driven by a one-time gain of $9.6 billion from the sale of its Digital Aviation Solutions. Despite this, the company continues to face operational and financial challenges, including operating losses in its commercial and defense segments, negative free cash flow for the year, and increased debt due to the Spirit AeroSystems acquisition. However, a record backlog of $682 billion suggests strong long-term demand for its aircraft.

feed.title: NWF Advisory Services Inc. Reduces Position in American Express Company $AXP
feed.summary: NWF Advisory Services Inc. decreased its stake in American Express Company (NYSE:AXP) by 11.0% in the third quarter, selling 4,579 shares and now owning 37,222 shares valued at $12.36 million. Despite this reduction, American Express remains the fund's 18th largest holding, accounting for 1.4% of its portfolio. Other institutional investors, including Vanguard Group Inc. and Geode Capital Management LLC, increased their holdings in American Express during the second quarter.

feed.title: NWF Advisory Services Inc. Sells 20,813 Shares of Bank of America Corporation $BAC

The article also highlights recent positive and negative market sentiments impacting BAC.

feed.title: Kornitzer Capital Management Inc. KS Has $10.18 Million Stock Holdings in Marathon Petroleum Corporation $MPC

Despite this, institutional investors and hedge funds still own 76.77% of the company's stock, with several other firms increasing their positions. feed.title: Nicola Wealth Management LTD. Increases Position in Intuitive Surgical, Inc. $ISRG
feed.summary: Nicola Wealth Management LTD. significantly increased its stake in Intuitive Surgical, Inc. (NASDAQ:ISRG) by 109.8% in the third quarter, making it their 13th largest holding. The article also details other institutional investor activity, recent insider stock sales totaling over $27 million, and provides an overview of Intuitive Surgical's latest financial performance and analyst ratings. The medical equipment provider's stock performance and company background are also discussed.

feed.summary: Kornitzer Capital Management Inc. KS decreased its stake in Gilead Sciences (NASDAQ:GILD) by 4.3% in the third quarter of 2025, selling 15,010 shares and retaining 334,476 shares valued at $37.13 million. Despite this reduction, several other large institutional investors increased their positions in Gilead. The company exceeded Q3 earnings and revenue estimates and holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average target price near $134.52.

feed.title: Fastenal Company (NASDAQ:FAST) Raises Dividend to $0.24 Per Share
feed.summary: Fastenal Company (NASDAQ:FAST) announced an increase in its quarterly dividend to $0.24 per share, up from $0.22, with shareholders of record on January 29th receiving payment on February 26th. The company has a 26-year history of annual dividend increases and a payout ratio of 80%, with analysts expecting continued coverage by earnings. Recent insider buying by directors and significant institutional ownership were also highlighted.

feed.title: Northrop Grumman posts higher quarterly profit as geopolitical uncertainty fuels demand
feed.summary: Northrop Grumman reported a higher fourth-quarter profit and revenue, driven by strong sales in its aeronautics business amidst heightened geopolitical tensions. Despite this growth, the company's 2026 sales forecast of US$43.5 billion to $44 billion fell short of Wall Street estimates, leading to a slight dip in premarket trading. Delays in a comprehensive homeland missile defense system initiative also impacted potential sales.

feed.title: Kornitzer Capital Management Inc. KS Decreases Holdings in IDEXX Laboratories, Inc. $IDXX
feed.summary: Kornitzer Capital Management Inc. KS reduced its stake in IDEXX Laboratories, Inc. (NASDAQ:IDXX) by 22.6% in the third quarter of 2025, selling 4,900 shares and owning 16,744 shares valued at $10.698 million. Despite this reduction, other institutional investors increased their holdings, and an executive of IDEXX Laboratories also sold a significant number of shares. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and has received several "buy" ratings and increased price targets from analysts.

feed.title: Nicola Wealth Management LTD. Sells 16,000 Shares of IDEXX Laboratories, Inc. $IDXX
feed.summary: Nicola Wealth Management LTD. has reduced its stake in IDEXX Laboratories, Inc. by 46.0%, selling 16,000 shares and now owning 18,800 shares valued at $12.01 million. This comes amidst other institutional investors increasing their positions in IDEXX, and a recent insider sale by an EVP. Analysts currently rate IDEXX Laboratories a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $763.50.

feed.title: Aptiv Announces Leadership Appointments and Company Name for New Independent Electrical Distribution Systems Company
feed.summary: Aptiv PLC has announced key leadership appointments and the name "Versigent" for its Electrical Distribution Systems (EDS) business, which will spin off as an independent company by April 1, 2026. Joseph Liotine has been named CEO and Doug Ostermann CFO of Versigent, which is expected to trade on the NYSE under the ticker symbol "VGNT". The new company will focus on providing versatile, intelligent electrical solutions for the automotive and commercial vehicle markets.

feed.title: Sense Announces Strategic Investment from Analog Devices
feed.summary: Sense, a leader in grid edge intelligence, has received a strategic investment from Analog Devices, Inc. (ADI). This investment will support the development of scalable grid edge technologies and intelligence solutions for grid operators. The collaboration aims to accelerate the adoption of high-performance data and computation capabilities for a smarter, more reliable electric grid.

feed.title: How PSE&G helped 480,000 New Jersey customers cut $900M from bills
feed.summary: PSE&G's Clean Energy Future–Energy Efficiency programs have helped nearly 480,000 New Jersey customers save over $900 million annually on utility bills since October 2020. These programs have also led to significant energy savings, including 3.1 million MWh of annual electric savings and 80 million therms of natural gas savings, avoiding roughly 2.3 million tons of CO2 annually. Additionally, the initiative has supported workforce development by placing over 7,300 individuals into clean energy careers.

feed.title: PACCAR Achieves Very Good Annual Revenues and Net Income
feed.summary: PACCAR reported very good annual revenues and net income in 2025, with strong contributions from PACCAR Parts and PACCAR Financial Services. The company achieved $28.44 billion in annual revenues and a net income of $2.38 billion, including a non-recurring charge, or an adjusted net income of $2.64 billion. PACCAR also highlighted investments in new technologies, facilities, and a strong market position for its Kenworth, Peterbilt, and DAF truck brands globally.

feed.title: Data behind Super Bowl LX: NetApp system drives fan experience
feed.summary: NetApp (NASDAQ: NTAP) is powering data operations for Super Bowl LX as the Official Intelligent Data Infrastructure Partner of the San Francisco 49ers and the National Football League (NFL). Their enterprise-grade data platform supports digital and physical fan experiences at Levi’s® Stadium and for viewers globally. The system manages massive data streams from sensors, photos, videos, and social media interactions, ensuring a seamless and high-quality experience for all fans, whether in Silicon Valley or internationally.

feed.title: Incyte to Report Fourth Quarter and Year-End 2025 Financial Results
feed.summary: Incyte (Nasdaq: INCY) announced its schedule for the fourth quarter and year-end 2025 financial results. The press release will be issued on February 10, 2026, at 7:00 a.m. ET, followed by a conference call and webcast at 8:00 a.m. ET on the same day. Further details, including dial-in numbers and webcast access, are provided for interested parties.

feed.title: HCA Healthcare stock rises after Q4 results (HCA:NYSE)
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare (HCA) stock rose ~7% in premarket trading despite mixed Q4 results, driven by the announcement of a new $10 billion share buyback program and an increased quarterly dividend to $0.78 per share. The company also provided 2026 financial targets, including adjusted EBITDA of $15.55B-$16.45B and revenue of $76.5B-$80.0B, both largely exceeding analyst consensus.

feed.title: Enphase Energy Highlights Firefighter Feedback on Microinverter-Based Solar Systems From SAFE Training Program
feed.summary: Enphase Energy shared feedback from firefighters participating in Solar and Fire Education (SAFE) training, revealing that over 98% would recommend microinverter-based solar systems due to their safety and design. The company emphasizes the importance of its all-AC architecture, which eliminates high-voltage DC on roofs, and panel-level rapid shutdown features for enhancing first responder safety during emergencies. Enphase Energy is committed to supporting education and technology to reduce risks associated with evolving energy systems.

feed.title: Boeing (NYSE:BA) Reports Upbeat Q4 CY2025
feed.summary: Boeing (NYSE:BA) reported strong Q4 CY2025 results, with revenue of $23.95 billion, significantly beating analyst estimates. The company also posted a non-GAAP profit of $9.92 per share, a substantial improvement from previous quarters. These results indicate a solid recovery and positive momentum for Boeing heading into the new year.

feed.title: Roper Technologies: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Roper Technologies Inc. reported fourth-quarter earnings of $428.4 million, or $3.97 per share, topping Wall Street expectations with adjusted earnings of $5.21 per share. Although revenue of $2.06 billion missed Street forecasts, the company provided an optimistic outlook for the current quarter and the full year, projecting earnings between $4.95 and $5 per share for the current quarter and $21.30 to $21.55 per share for the full year.

feed.title: Citi Maintains Regeneron Pharmaceuticals(REGN.US) With Buy Rating, Maintains Target Price $900
feed.summary: Citi analyst Geoff Meacham has reiterated a Buy rating for Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (REGN.US), keeping the target price at $900. According to TipRanks data, the analyst has a 57.8% success rate and an average return of 7.5% over the past year. This information is provided for informational purposes and is not an investment recommendation.

feed.title: Nicola Wealth Management LTD. Makes New $11.47 Million Investment in Copart, Inc. $CPRT
feed.summary: Nicola Wealth Management LTD. has made a significant new investment in Copart, Inc., purchasing 255,000 shares valued at approximately $11.47 million during the third quarter. This move is part of broader institutional interest, with other hedge funds also adjusting their stakes in Copart. The article also details recent insider transactions and analyst ratings, with Copart holding a "Moderate Buy" consensus and an average target price of $47.60.

feed.title: Synchrony Financial (NYSE:SYF) Misses Q4 CY2025 Sales Expectations
feed.summary: Synchrony Financial (NYSE:SYF) reported Q4 CY2025 results, missing revenue expectations with sales flat year-over-year at $3.79 billion, though GAAP profit of $2.04 per share met estimates. The company's net interest margin beat analyst estimates, but its efficiency ratio and tangible book value per share fell short. Despite this, Synchrony Financial demonstrated strong long-term tangible book value per share growth.
